comment: Filename edge cases. Harnesses CREATE these files at runtime from the names below — git cannot reliably carry NFD/exotic names across platforms. Each entry: name (the exact filename to create), encoding note, and what must hold after a scan.

cases.name: café-nfc.jpg
cases.expect: scanned; searchable by 'café' regardless of query normalization

cases.name: café-nfd.jpg
cases.note: e + U+0301 combining acute (NFD) — macOS HFS+/APFS native form
cases.expect: scanned; not treated as a distinct sibling of the NFC twin on case/norm-insensitive filesystems

cases.name: 🏖️-beach.jpg
cases.expect: scanned; rename/tag round-trips preserve the name byte-for-byte

cases.name: שלום-rtl.jpg
cases.expect: scanned; UI renders without bidi spoofing of the extension

cases.name: mixed-‮gpj.exe
cases.note: U+202E RIGHT-TO-LEFT OVERRIDE — extension spoof attempt
cases.expect: scanned or skipped, but NEVER displayed in UI with the visually-spoofed extension unflagged

cases.name: ends-with-space .jpg
cases.expect: scanned; Windows shell ops handle without silent failure

cases.name: very-long-
cases.expect: scanned on macOS; Windows handles via extended-length paths (M24)
